name: name
dialog-delete-all-text: Are you sure you want to delete ALL the items?
dialog-delete-text: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
dialog-delete-relationship-text: Are you sure you want to delete this relationship?
dialog-delete-relationship-text-warn: This action will delete all relationships between the two elements.
aria-label-import: Import a new diagram from a file
information-creation-usage: The most important functionality of the application is the ability to create classes and interfaces at will. To do this, just direct the cursor to the + button and select class or interface. After this, a new entity will be created in your visual field on the board.
information-edition-usage-1: For toggle the edition mode in any entity just click it with the right click. This will enable the edition of it's name, attributes and methods, additionally, the button with the trash icon allow the deletion of the entity. For going back to the prior state right click it again.
information-edition-usage-1_tab-port: For toggle the edition mode in any entity just double tap it. This will enable the edition of it's name, attributes and methods, additionally, the button with the trash icon allow the deletion of the entity. For going back to the prior state double tap it again.
information-edition-usage-2: The add button of the right down corner of the entity allow you to add new relationships, before using it make sure there is another entity you want to pair to the present one. Hover it and it will display the catalogue of relationships available, select one and click the entity you want to connect with.
information-edition-usage-2_tab-port: The add button of the right down corner of the entity allow you to add new relationships, before using it make sure there is another entity you want to pair to the present one. Hover it and it will display the catalogue of relationships available, select one and double tap the entity you want to connect with.
information-edition-usage-3: When a relationship is generated you can use the right click over it to delete it. A button of a trash will appear and you will be able to delete it.
information-edition-usage-3_tab-port: When a relationship is generated you can use the double tap over it to delete it. A button of a trash will appear and you will be able to delete it.
information-uml-definition: UML (Unified Modeling Language) as it's name describes it's an unified modeling language that provides a standard notation for graphically representing software systems and business processes. It is widely used in software engineering for modeling information systems and designing software architectures. It's based in classes, interfaces and relationships between them.
information-relationships-usage-dependen: Most basic and weakest type of relationship between classes. There is a dependency between two classes if some changes to the definition of one class might result in modifications to another class.
information-relationships-usage-associat: Is a relationship in which one object uses or interacts with another. Stronger than dependency. It's more a structural connection while in dependency the relationship only exists for a brief moment.
information-relationships-usage-implemen: Is a relationship in which an interface defines methods which are implemented in a class. The class inherits the interface methods and properties.
information-relationships-usage-inherita: Is a relationship in which the object inherits the interface (like in implementation) and also the implementation of other class. It's also able to extend it's behaviour.
information-relationships-usage-aggregat: Specialized type of association that represents “one-to-many”, “many-to-many” or “whole-part” relations between multiple objects.
information-relationships-usage-composit: Specific kind of aggregation, where one object is composed of one or more instances of the other. The related can only exist as part of the container.
